name: Science Park
description_short: Science Park Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, NCUA-insured credit union serving New Haven, CT residents with personal loans, auto refinancing, and debit card services.
description_long:
Science Park Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution operating as a federally chartered credit union under NCUA (National Credit Union Administration) oversight. Based on their website, the organization has been serving its community with financial products and member-focused services, emphasizing accessibility and fraud protection for account holders.

The credit union offers personal loans for vacation, school, and bill consolidation, along with auto loan refinancing services highlighted as featuring low rates and fast approval. Members gain access to online banking, debit card services with fraud alert capabilities, surcharge-free ATM access through a locator network, and Card Valet fraud protection tools that allow members to control their debit card transactions. The institution appears to emphasize digital security and member convenience through multiple service channels.

Science Park distinguishes itself through explicit accessibility commitments (AudioEye-enabled website), membership expansion to include anyone who lives, works, worships, volunteers, or attends school in New Haven, CT, and a focus on fraud prevention features like SMS-based debit card fraud alerts and Card Valet control. As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, member ownership and not-for-profit status means profits are theoretically returned to members rather than shareholders.

The website provides limited detailed information about specific loan terms, rates, fees, or product specifics. While the credit union emphasizes service offerings and security, potential members should contact them directly at (203) 786-5885 to verify current rates, eligibility requirements, and complete product details before joining or opening accounts.
services: Online banking platform with mobile accessibility
Personal loans for vacation, school, and bill expenses
Auto loan refinancing with stated low rates and fast approval
Debit card services with fraud alert SMS signup
Card Valet fraud control system for transaction management
Surcharge-free ATM network access and locator
Change of address processing for relocating members
pros: NCUA-insured member accounts provide federal protection up to $250,000
Card Valet fraud control system allows members to toggle debit card on/off via phone
SMS fraud alerts for debit card transactions with phone signup option
Surcharge-free ATM network access through surcharge-free locator tool
Membership eligibility expanded to anyone living, working, worshiping, or studying in New Haven, CT
AudioEye-enabled website demonstrates accessibility commitment for members with disabilities
Not-for-profit credit union structure returns profits to members rather than external shareholders
cons: Website lacks specific APR ranges, loan amounts, fees, or product terms
Limited geographic service area restricted to New Haven, CT membership eligibility
Minimal information about business accounts or services for self-employed members
No online application process visible—requires contacting institution directly
Sparse details about savings products, share certificates, or investment options
best_for: New Haven, CT residents and workers seeking member-owned credit union banking with fraud protection
Individuals wanting to refinance auto loans at competitive rates with same-institution convenience
People prioritizing debit card fraud control through Card Valet and SMS alerts
diagnosis: Science Park Federal Credit Union is best for New Haven, CT area residents seeking community-focused credit union membership with emphasis on debit card fraud protection and auto loan refinancing. The primary caveat is that their website provides minimal specifics on rates, fees, loan amounts, or product terms—interested members must contact the credit union directly at (203) 786-5885 to evaluate whether offerings match their financial needs.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Science Park — Credit Union in NEW HAVEN, CT | CreditDoc
meta_description: Science Park — NCUA-insured credit union in NEW HAVEN, CT. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
